title: [ExportVerilog] Crash with out-of-order uses of inout operations
body:
```mlir
hw.module private @regInitRandomReuse(%a: i32) -> (b:i32) {
    %c0_i32 = hw.constant 0 : i32
    %w = sv.wire  : !hw.inout<array<1xi32>>
    %2 = sv.read_inout %1: !hw.inout<i32>
    %1 = sv.array_index_inout %w[%c0_i32] : !hw.inout<array<1xi32>>, i32
    hw.output %2 : i32
  }
```
`circt-opt -export-verilog` crashes with the IR. This is because we are not currently reordering `*_inout` operations.
